corpus.title: Batched score handler
corpus.text: POST /score_batch scores many query vectors against a shared candidate matrix.

corpus.title: QNN runtime env
corpus.text: Set QNN_SDK_ROOT, LD_LIBRARY_PATH, and ADSP_LIBRARY_PATH before using the HTP backend.

corpus.title: CPU fallback
corpus.text: When the accelerated runtime is unavailable, the request falls back to the CPU path.
